economic_notes: Nation holds 8.33% ownership in Prince Albert First Nations Business Development LP and 8.33% in Prince Albert Development Corporation, both accounted for under modified equity method. Received $50,000 distribution from Prince Albert First Nations Business Development LP. Operates Lionel Head Memorial Store (Red Earth Cree Developments Inc.).
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Comparative 2021 figures have been restated per note 23. Four consolidated entities: Red Earth Cree Nation Operations, Section 95 Social Housing, Health Service, and Red Earth Cree Developments Inc. (Lionel Head Memorial Store). Two government business enterprises under modified equity method. Large unexpended/deferred revenue balance of $15.7M primarily from ISC capital project funding. Net debt position of $3.7M. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($24,297,679) + Ottawa Trust ($2,921) + PAGC ($1,172,103) + CMHC ($769,707) + First Nations Trust ($326,163) + Northern Lights ($68,654) = $26,637,227; OSR = store sales + rental + insurance + interest + admin fees + other revenue + income from partnerships = $4,444,258.
